_comment: BYO Webex integration - each user sets their OWN. Copy to the path in WEBEX_SETTINGS (default ~/.openclaw/webex.json), fill clientId/clientSecret/redirectUri from your integration at developer.webex.com, then run: node oauth-setup.mjs url -> approve -> node oauth-setup.mjs exchange <code>. The refreshToken is filled automatically by that flow; keep this file 0600.
